task_completion.description: Create a Server Action named 'Mark as Hot Lead' for the 'Lead/Opportunity' model.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Server Actions list or form view showing a new action with the Action Name 'Mark as Hot Lead' and the Model set to 'Lead/Opportunity' (crm.lead).

task_completion.description: Configure the Server Action to update Priority to High and Probability to 90%.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Server Action configuration showing 'Update Record' (or similar action type) with data lines setting 'Probability' to 90 and 'Priority' to High (or the maximum available star rating).

task_completion.description: Enable the Server Action as a contextual action.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Remove Contextual Action' button on the Server Action form (indicating it was created), OR look for 'Mark as Hot Lead' listed in the 'Action' dropdown menu when viewing an opportunity.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the 'Solar Panel Upgrade - Smith Residence' opportunity in the CRM Pipeline.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Odoo CRM Pipeline (Kanban or List view) or the specific form view for the opportunity named 'Solar Panel Upgrade - Smith Residence'.

task_completion.description: Execute the action to update the opportunity's Probability to 90%.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the form view for 'Solar Panel Upgrade - Smith Residence' and verify the Probability field displays 90.00%.

task_completion.description: Execute the action to update the opportunity's Priority to High.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the form view for 'Solar Panel Upgrade - Smith Residence' and verify the Priority field (star icons) is set to High (2 stars filled, which is the maximum in standard Odoo 17).

integrity.description: The agent used the Odoo web interface to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that the screenshots show the Odoo web application in a browser. The agent should not be using terminal commands (like psql or python scripts) to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the results.
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure the browser's Developer Tools (Inspect Element) pane is not open in the screenshots showing the final opportunity values.

integrity.description: The final results are displayed in the genuine Odoo interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Verify that the final state of the opportunity is shown in the standard Odoo CRM form view, not in a text editor or a mocked-up HTML page.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Action Name: 'Mark as Hot Lead'. Target Model: 'Lead/Opportunity' (crm.lead). Target Opportunity: 'Solar Panel Upgrade - Smith Residence'. Expected Probability: 90.0%. IMPORTANT NOTE ON PRIORITY: The task description asks for Priority 'High (3 stars)'. However, standard Odoo 17 Community CRM only supports priority values up to High (2 stars). Please accept 2 stars (High) as the correct and fully successful fulfillment of the priority requirement.
